## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress and align on new strategic priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Traffic Surging:** Organic traffic to GrowthX articles grew \~55% for the second straight week, driven by AI agent and security content.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**New Gartner Keyword:** A new article on "Workload Access Managers" is a top priority to capture SEO for a new Gartner category that defines Aembit's market position.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [**Content Backlog:** A large content backlog exists (17 articles, 8 glossary pages in review), requiring focus before new topics are created.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Tech Accuracy Process:** A new process using AI to cross-reference articles against 7+ external sources will ensure technical accuracy, addressing a key concern.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

## Topics

### Organic Traffic Performance

  - [**GrowthX Articles (Organic Only):**](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
      - [Sessions & engaged sessions up \~55% for the second week.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
      - [Traffic is now distributed across \~10 articles, up from 2–4.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Top drivers: AI agents and AI security content.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [**Overall Blog (Organic Only):**](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [Views: 345 → 479](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [Active Users: 250 → 288](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [Views per user & average time also increased.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [\~90+ articles now receive at least one view.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [**Glossary Pages (Organic Only):**](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [Early results: 106 views, 20 active users.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [Goal: Establish a baseline to measure how internal linking boosts overall blog traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)

### New Strategic Priority: Workload Access Managers

  - [**Opportunity:** Gartner is reportedly creating a new category, "Workload Access Managers," which perfectly defines Aembit's market position.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This term differentiates Aembit's access/enforcement focus from the governance/visibility focus of "Workload Identity Managers."](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**Action:** Create an article to build SEO authority for this term before Gartner's official announcement.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Process Improvement: Technical Accuracy

  - [**Problem:** Ensuring technical accuracy is a challenge, as identified by Asher.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new process was piloted on the "Securing MCP server" article.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Process:** An AI tool cross-referenced the article against 7+ external sources.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Result:** Identified one minor section needing revision, which was completed.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [**Decision:** This process will be applied to all future articles to guarantee accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### Content Tagging Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The "AI workloads" tag is too broad for specialized articles on "agentic AI."](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Rationale:** "Agentic AI" is a distinct, high-volume keyword that deserves its own tag for better organization and SEO targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Decision:** Add an "Agentic AI" tag to the content management system.](https://fathom.video/share/tMzgh98JQj-1Fy5zKaMdgoEJxwmQ6ksr?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
